locations.name: 中东
locations.summary: 中東（英語：Middle East，阿拉伯語：الشرق الأوسط，希伯來語：המזרח התיכון）是一個地理區域，和西亞大致重疊，並包含部分北非地區，但不包含外高加索地區，也是非洲與歐亞大陸的亞洲區。具体是指地中海東部與南部區域…

locations.name: 中亚
locations.summary: 中亚（英語：Central Asia；俄語：Средняя Азия / Центральная Азия）即亚洲中部，在地理上是指西至里海，东到中国新疆，南到阿富汗，北到俄罗斯的广大区域。而根据长期占据这片区域大部分领土的前苏联官方定义…

relations.subject: Pale rockfinch
relations.evidence: | doi = 10.1007/s10336-004-0034-9 | title = Affinities of Carpospiza brachydactyla (Passeriformes; Passeridae) | journal = Journal of Ornithology | volume = 145 | issue = 3 | year = 2004 | pages = 223–226 | bibcode = 2004JOrn..145..223B | s2cid = 32389019 }} The range of pale rockfinch extends from eastern Turkey to Afghanistan, and south into the Arabian Peninsula and northern Africa as far as Ethiopia. Its natural habitats are subtropical or tropical dry shrubland and temperate grassland. The breeding pattern of the pale rock sparrow is associated with specific aspects of habitat
